find_cockatrice.title: Locate a Cockatrice (Ice & Fire — spawns in Savanna biomes; if rare, check Jungle or Plains)

mirror.title: Use a Mirror to petrify the Cockatrice (Ice & Fire — look away or use mirror)

subtitle.text: It sees nothing. Not darkness. Not blindness. The absence of looking.

description: The Cockatrice is the Desert Civilization's remnant creature.
Its gaze petrifies. Looking at it directly causes Slowness and Weakness.
The Mirror Shield reflects its petrification back.
The Desert Civilization mastered death, poison, petrification.
They fell after mastering death until they saw nothing else.
The Cockatrice Eye is what they saw at the end:
⚠️ Known spawn bug: Cockatrice may not spawn in Savannas in 1.20.
Try Jungle biomes, Plains with high heat, or Desert adjacent biomes.
Use Antique Atlas to map your search area.
The Cockatrice Eye is the center ingredient of the Black Eye recipe.
→ Kill it using the Mirror Shield or indirect tactics [check]
→ Collect the Cockatrice Eye (rare drop — use Looting enchantment)
